simulation.satellite_detail_policy: ignored: downstream analysis consumes scenario/test-level metrics and does not read AttackSummary satellite lines or ActionLog satellite traces

skipped_classes.label: Level 2 免疫自愈
skipped_classes.selection_rule: 0.40 <= fail_score < 0.50 且局部建链失效比例 <= 0.25

skipped_classes.label: Level 3 批量冗余自愈
skipped_classes.selection_rule: 0.40 <= fail_score < 0.50 且至少一个目标节点局部建链失效比例 > 0.25
